title: Letter dated 28 feb 2017
text: 5 File No.CW-1-13/312017-CW-1 ifift4 IT1TO ViVi)1 TiteMi ts0 CI iirWrff 4-ianoti trei4 itr4 WIC4t 1rd-q, 9t 1:4—A - 110001 Secretar: Government 0-n Ministry of Women & Child Development Shastri Shawan, New Dafhi-110001 Websitei http://www.wccLuic.in Dated 28th February, 2017 Receipt No4,..,412807/2017/CW-I g,1 Leevila DO No. CW-I-13/3/2017-CW-I Dear U-A^- I would like to draw your attention to DO letter no. 22-6/2015-CW-I dated 26.03.2015 (copy enclosed) of Hon'b!e Minister, WCD for showing of a short animated film (Komal) in all schools under State/UT Governments to sensitize the children on what constitutes an "inappropriate touch" or what is molestation. 2. The Ministry of Women and Child Development had commissioned a short animated film through Childline India Foundation which is funded by the Ministry. This film (Roma!) has also won the national film award in the category of "best educational film". To create awareness among school children on the above issue, it would be essential that this film is shown in all schools in the country. 3. I would be grateful if you could kindly take appropriate action for compulsorily showing of "Komar video in all the schools all over India. Hon'ble Minister, WCD has desired that showing of this film must be made mandatory. This video is accessible on Youtube on following links: https://www.youtube.00rniwatch?v=1/kYONtweVV8 — English Video htta§://www,youtube.comiwatchZy=QwzoUniOcxo — Hindi Video With regards, Yours sincerely, (Leena Nair) Shri Anil Swarup Secretary, Ministry of Human Resource Development, Department of School Education & Literacy, Shastri Bhawan, New Delhi-110001.
